title: rhododendron mollicomum
intro: Rhododendron mollicomum, also known as the hairy rhododendron, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rhododendron genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron mollicomum include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a solvent.
